overall.description: A nighttime walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city center in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring two giant holographic koi fish swimming between skyscrapers. The camera moves steadily forward through the streets, passing under palm trees while observing the illuminated urban landscape and the circling holographic display overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit cyberpunk city plaza with holographic displays

events.description: blue holographic fish begins swimming toward center from right side, initiating circular pattern
orange and blue holographic fish cross paths, swapping positions in the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cyberpunk city street looking up at the holographic fish display

entered.detail: tallest skyscraper with circular logo at summit, dominating the skyline
giant glowing orange koi fish hologram with flowing fins
giant glowing cyan betta fish hologram with translucent fins
cluster of high-rise buildings covered in colorful neon advertisements
cluster of high-rise buildings with vertical neon signage and billboards

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide cyberpunk city street at night, looking up at two massive holographic fish swimming in the air between neon-lit skyscrapers. The orange fish starts on the left and the blue fish on the right, then begin circling each other as the camera walks forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk boulevard approaching tree line

events.description: holographic fish complete a full circular orbit around each other, returning to opposite sides
palm tree fronds begin entering frame from top, indicating approach to tree canopy

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the city street, observing the circling holographic fish overhead

entered.detail: palm leaves beginning to hang down into the upper frame from above

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward as the holographic fish complete their circular dance, having swapped positions. The central mega-tower grows larger as the camera approaches, and palm tree fronds begin to appear overhead, signaling the transition to a tree-lined section of the boulevard.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined cyberpunk boulevard with overhead holographic display

events.description: palm fronds completely block the view of the fish and tower momentarily
second palm tree passes overhead, partially blocking the holographic fish
camera emerges from tree cover, fish now appear further in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking under the palm tree canopy while watching the holographic fish continue their display overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the palm tree canopy, with fronds occluding the view twice as the walk continues. The holographic fish swim further into the distance while the surrounding neon skyscrapers grow larger and more detailed. The segment ends as the camera emerges from the tree cover, with the fish now appearing smaller against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk boulevard that transitions from an open view of the skyline to a sheltered, tree-lined corridor. It begins with a wide perspective of two massive holographic fish, one orange and one blue, circling each other in the air between towering skyscrapers. As the camera advances, the fish complete their dance and swap positions while a central mega-tower looms larger in the frame. The scene then shifts as the camera enters a canopy of palm trees, with fronds momentarily occluding the view while the surrounding neon architecture becomes more detailed and imposing. Finally, the camera emerges from the tree cover, leaving the holographic fish to appear smaller and more distant against the dark night sky.
